purpose: Delta ingestion from sigurscan_payment_destination_registry_wave2: P0 high-confidence public-official payment destinations, deduped against the active atlas.

rules.include: tier=P0, confidence=high, CUI present, source_url present, valid IBAN, not already active in atlas
rules.exclude: duplicates already active, non-P0 rows, missing CUI/source, invalid IBAN
rules.literal_x_iban: Set only when the published official IBAN contains X characters and passes MOD-97 validation.
